If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, this attack does 120 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Regidrago V
Effects: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck. If any of those cards are Energy cards, attach them to this Pokémon.
This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Regidrago V
Effects: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck. If any of those cards are Energy cards, attach them to this Pokémon.
This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Lugia V
Effects: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.
You may discard a Stadium in play.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Lugia V
Effects: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.
You may discard a Stadium in play.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Ho-Oh V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in your discard pile, you may put it onto your Bench. If you do, attach up to 4 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each type of basic Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Brandon
Description: You can use this card only when it is the last card in your hand. Draw a card for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

Name: Candice
Description: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of [W] Pokémon and [W] Energy cards you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Furisode Girl
Description: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck. You may switch that Pokémon with your Active Pokémon.

Name: Gym Trainer
Description: Draw 2 cards. If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, draw 2 more cards.

Name: Lance
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 [N] Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Serena
Description: Choose 1:• Discard up to 3 cards from your hand. (You must discard at least 1 card. ) If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. • Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon V with their Active Pokémon.

Name: Wallace
Description: Draw 3 cards. Your opponent may draw a card. If they do, draw 1 more card.

Name: Worker
Description: Draw 3 cards. Discard a Stadium in play.

Name: Serperior VSTAR
Effects: You may move any amount of Energy from your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.
This attack does 60 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Alolan Vulpix VSTAR
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon. During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Pokémon that have an Ability.
This attack does 70 damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon V in play. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Regieleki VMAX
Ability-Effect: Your Basic [L] Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Unown VSTAR
Effects: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

Until this Pokémon leaves play, it gains an Ability that has the effect “The Weakness of each of your opponent's Pokémon in play is now [P]. (The amount of Weakness doesn't change. )" (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mawile VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon. If you do, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Regidrago VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may discard the top 7 cards of your deck. Then, put up to 2 cards from your discard pile into your hand. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: Choose an attack from a [N] Pokémon in your discard pile and use it as this attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Lugia VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may put up to 2 [C] Pokémon that don't have a Rule Box from your discard pile onto your Bench. (Pokémon V, Pokémon-GX, etc. have Rule Boxes. ) (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: You may discard a Stadium in play.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Energy Switch
Description: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

Name: Gapejaw Bog
Description: Whenever either player puts a Basic Pokémon from their hand onto their Bench, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

Name: Leafy Camo Poncho
Description: Whenever your opponent plays a Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to the Pokémon VSTAR or Pokémon VMAX this card is attached to.

Name: V Guard Energy
Description: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides [C] Energy. The Pokémon this card is attached to takes 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon V (after applying Weakness and Resistance). This effect can't be applied more than once at a time to the same Pokémon.

Name: Braixen
Effects: This attack does 60 damage for each Serena card in your discard pile.

Name: Milotic
Effects: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Flaaffy
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a [L] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Jynx
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon V, your opponent can't take any Prize cards for it.
Effects: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Gardevoir
Ability-Effect: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 2 cards.

Name: Malamar
Effects: Reveal any number of Rapid Strike cards from your hand. This attack does 40 damage for each card you revealed in this way. Then, shuffle those cards into your deck.

Name: Rockruff
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Passimian
Ability-Effect: Your Rapid Strike Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Benched Pokémon V and Benched Pokémon-GX (before applying Weakness and Resistance). You can't apply more than 1 Throwing Coach Ability at a time.
Effects: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Druddigon
Effects: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon during their last turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

Name: Smeargle
Effects: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may attach any number of basic Energy cards you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Altaria
Effects: Move all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Kricketune V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 3 cards in your hand. If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may draw cards until you have 4 cards in your hand instead. You can't use more than 1 Exciting Stage Ability each turn.
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Serperior V
Effects: Heal 30 damage from each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Blaziken V
Effects: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Blaziken VMAX
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
Choose up to 2 of your Benched Rapid Strike Pokémon and attach an Energy card from your discard pile to each of them.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Zeraora V
Effects: If 1 of your other Rapid Strike Pokémon used an attack during your last turn, this attack also does 160 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mawile V
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Corviknight V
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Sky Hurricane.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Corviknight VMAX
Ability-Effect: Prevent all effects of your opponent's Pokémon's Abilities done to this Pokémon.
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use G-Max Hurricane.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Rayquaza VMAX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 3 cards.
Effects: You may discard any amount of basic [R] Energy or any amount of basic [L] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Duraludon VMAX
Ability-Effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have Special Energy attached.
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Blissey V
Ability-Effect: Whenever you attach an Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon, it recovers from all Special Conditions.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you did any damage with this attack, you may attach up to 3 Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Friends in Galar
Description: Draw 3 cards.

Name: Gordie
Description: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Energy cards you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Judge
Description: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.

Name: Professor Burnet
Description: Search your deck for up to 2 cards and discard them. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Raihan
Description: You can play this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn. Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Sordward & Shielbert
Description: Choose a Trainer card from your discard pile. Then, ask your opponent if you may put it into your hand. If yes, put that card into your hand. If no, draw 3 cards.

Name: Rayquaza VMAX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 3 cards.
Effects: You may discard any amount of basic [R] Energy or any amount of basic [L] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Duraludon VMAX
Ability-Effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have Special Energy attached.
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
